heading: Application to other laws
label: 973a Application to other laws
text: The seizure by a Pacific Island Party of a vessel of the United States shall not be determined to be a seizure described in or if the seizure is found by the Secretary of State to be in accordance with the provisions of the Treaty.section 1825(a)(4)(C) of this titlesection 1972 of title 22
notes: Amendments1996— made technical amendment to reference in original act which appears in text as reference to .Pub. L. 104–208section 1825(a)(4)(C) of this title
